US sub sinks Iranian warship in Indian Ocean, Hegseth saysSri Lanka's navy says around 140 people are feared missing after a military vessel went down off its southern coast. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0e55g03v2zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0e55g03v2zo#1 Wed, 04 Mar 2026 16:56:17 GMT
Video of US torpedo hitting Iranian warship released by PentagonUS Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the US military has sunk "an Iranian warship" in the Indian Ocean with a torpedo. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cd6zzg2g7vno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/cd6zzg2g7vno#1 Wed, 04 Mar 2026 15:05:10 GMT
